raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (left box on the table)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right arm can reach the right side face of the darker box without colliding with the lighter box; the contact point is below the top edge to avoid slipping.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, preventing it from shifting toward the lighter box during lifting."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "darker box (left box on the table)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The left arm has clearance to contact the left side face of the darker box; the cup and lighter box are not in the left arm’s approach corridor; the right arm is already stabilizing.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held by the left end-effector using a non-claw side clamp; it is ready to be lifted while minimizing lateral slip."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "darker box (left box on the table)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both end-effectors are positioned on opposing side faces of the darker box with sufficient clearance from the lighter box and cup to apply inward clamping force.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is firmly clamped by both arms and lifted slightly above the tabletop, fully picked up and no longer in contact with the table."
  }
]

parsed_json.Target: darker box (left box on the table)
parsed_json.Precondition: The right arm can reach the right side face of the darker box without colliding with the lighter box; the contact point is below the top edge to avoid slipping.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is laterally constrained by the right end-effector, preventing it from shifting toward the lighter box during lifting.

parsed_json.Target: darker box (left box on the table)
parsed_json.Precondition: The left arm has clearance to contact the left side face of the darker box; the cup and lighter box are not in the left arm’s approach corridor; the right arm is already stabilizing.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held by the left end-effector using a non-claw side clamp; it is ready to be lifted while minimizing lateral slip.

parsed_json.Target: darker box (left box on the table)
parsed_json.Precondition: Both end-effectors are positioned on opposing side faces of the darker box with sufficient clearance from the lighter box and cup to apply inward clamping force.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is firmly clamped by both arms and lifted slightly above the tabletop, fully picked up and no longer in contact with the table.
